}

}

\section*{答案與解法提示}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0001}{lim-001}{極限 · R1}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1|\par
\textbf{Note.} 標準極限：sin x 和 x 在 0 附近同階，所以答案是 1。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0002}{lim-002}{極限 · R1}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 用 1-cos x 約等於 x\textasciicircum{}2/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0003}{lim-003}{極限 · R1}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|4|\par
\textbf{Note.} 因式分解為 (x-2)(x+2)，約掉後代入 x=2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0004}{lim-004}{極限 · R1}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|3/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 最高次項係數比是 3/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0005}{lim-005}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1|\par
\textbf{Note.} e\textasciicircum{}x 在 0 的線性項是 x。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0006}{lim-006}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|3|\par
\textbf{Note.} ln(1+u) 約等於 u，令 u=3x。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0007}{lim-007}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2|\par
\textbf{Note.} tan(4x) 約等於 4x，sin(2x) 約等於 2x。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0008}{lim-008}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 有理化後是 x/(sqrt(x\textasciicircum{}2+1)+x)，趨近 1/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0009}{lim-009}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-1/6|\par
\textbf{Note.} sin x = x - x\textasciicircum{}3/6 + ...。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0010}{lim-010}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2|\par
\textbf{Note.} e\textasciicircum{}\{2x\}=1+2x+2x\textasciicircum{}2+...。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0011}{lim-011}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|0|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 x=1/t，變成 -(ln t)/t，趨近 0。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0012}{lim-012}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} ln(1+x)=x-x\textasciicircum{}2/2+x\textasciicircum{}3/3-...。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0013}{lim-013}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} tan x = x+x\textasciicircum{}3/3+...，sin x = x-x\textasciicircum{}3/6+...。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0014}{lim-014}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 二階項來自 ln(1+x) 的 -x\textasciicircum{}2/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0015}{lim-015}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} sec x = 1+x\textasciicircum{}2/2+...。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0016}{lim-016}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-1/8|\par
\textbf{Note.} 展開 sqrt(1+1/x)，下一項是 -1/(8x\textasciicircum{}2)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0017}{lim-017}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} e\textasciicircum{}x-e\textasciicircum{}\{-x\}=2x+x\textasciicircum{}3/3+...。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0018}{lim-018}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} sin x 與 x cos x 的三階項相減。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0019}{lim-019}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-e/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} (1+x)\textasciicircum{}\{1/x\}=e(1-x/2+...)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0020}{lim-020}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-1/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} arctan x = x-x\textasciicircum{}3/3+...。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0021}{td-lim-001}{極限 · R6}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|exp(1/2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} 取 log 後，sum k/n\textasciicircum{}2 趨近 1/2，其餘高階項趨近 0。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0022}{td-lim-002}{極限 · R6}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|sqrt(e)/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} 把 log 展開到 1/n 項：log P\_n=1/2+1/(3n)+O(1/n\textasciicircum{}2)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0023}{td-lim-004}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} (1+x)\textasciicircum{}x=exp(x log(1+x))=1+x\textasciicircum{}2-x\textasciicircum{}3/2+...。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0024}{lim-021}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} tan x = x + x\textasciicircum{}3/3 + O(x\textasciicircum{}5)，所以分子約為 x\textasciicircum{}3/3，極限為 1/3。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0025}{lim-022}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|3/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 有理化後為 3x/(sqrt(x\textasciicircum{}2+3x)+x)，上下同除以 x 得 3/(sqrt(1+3/x)+1)，極限為 3/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0026}{lim-024}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} log(1+x)=x-x\textasciicircum{}2/2+O(x\textasciicircum{}3)，分子為 -x\textasciicircum{}2/2+O(x\textasciicircum{}3)，極限為 -1/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0027}{lim-025}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 u=xy，則 u->0，標準極限 sin u/u = 1。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0028}{lim-026}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|0|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 x=r cos theta, y=r sin theta，原式 = r cos\textasciicircum{}2 theta sin theta，當 r->0 時趨近 0。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0029}{lim-027}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|dne|\par
\textbf{Note.} 沿 y=x 得 1/2；沿 y=-x 得 -1/2。路徑極限不同，所以 DNE。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0030}{lim-028}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 設 r\textasciicircum{}2=x\textasciicircum{}2+y\textasciicircum{}2。有理化後為 1/(sqrt(1+r\textasciicircum{}2)+1)，令 r->0 得 1/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0031}{lim-029}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|0|\par
\textbf{Note.} 因 x\textasciicircum{}4+y\textasciicircum{}4 <= (x\textasciicircum{}2+y\textasciicircum{}2)\textasciicircum{}2，所以原式 <= x\textasciicircum{}2+y\textasciicircum{}2，極限為 0。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0032}{lim-030}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|9/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 1-cos(3x) \textasciitilde{} (3x)\textasciicircum{}2/2，所以極限為 9/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0033}{lim-031}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|0|\par
\textbf{Note.} With x=r cos t, y=r sin t, the expression is r\textasciicircum{}2 cos\textasciicircum{}2 t sin\textasciicircum{}2 t, so the limit is 0.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0034}{lim-032}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|dne|\par
\textbf{Note.} Along y=0 the value is 1; along x=0 the value is -1. The limit does not exist.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0035}{lim-033}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1|\par
\textbf{Note.} Set u=x+y. The expression becomes (e\textasciicircum{}u-1)/u, so the limit is 1.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0036}{lim-034}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|0|\par
\textbf{Note.} Let r=sqrt(x\textasciicircum{}2+y\textasciicircum{}2). Since |x|<=r, the absolute value is <= r\textasciicircum{}3/r\textasciicircum{}2=r, hence the limit is 0.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0037}{lim-035}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|5/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} As x->0, sin(5x)\textasciitilde{}5x and sin(2x)\textasciitilde{}2x, so the limit is 5/2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0038}{lim-036}{極限 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} log(1+x+x\textasciicircum{}2)=x+x\textasciicircum{}2-(x\textasciicircum{}2/2)+O(x\textasciicircum{}3)=x+x\textasciicircum{}2/2+O(x\textasciicircum{}3). The limit is 1/2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0039}{lim-037}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2|\par
\textbf{Note.} After rationalizing, the expression is 4/(sqrt(1+4x)+1), whose limit is 2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0040}{lim-039}{極限 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|dne|\par
\textbf{Note.} Along y=kx\textasciicircum{}2 the expression is k/(1+k\textasciicircum{}2). Since this depends on k, the limit does not exist.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0041}{lim-040}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2|\par
\textbf{Note.} Since log(1+2/x)\textasciitilde{}2/x, the limit is 2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0042}{gap-tech-001}{極限 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|rationalize|\par
\textbf{Note.} The right reflex is to rationalize with the conjugate.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0043}{gap-tech-002}{極限 · R2}

\textbf{Note.} Use Taylor expansion of e\textasciicircum{}\{2x\} around 0.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0044}{gap-tech-008}{極限 · R2}

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}

\solutionmeta{0069}{exam-lim-001}{極限 · R5}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0071}{exam-lim-003}{極限 · R5}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0072}{exam-lim-005}{極限 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2|\par

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0073}{exam-lim-006}{極限 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-2|\par
\textbf{Note.} sqrt(1+4x)=1+2x-2x\textasciicircum{}2+...

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0175}{der-016}{微分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/(1+cos(x))|\par

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0176}{der-017}{微分 · R3}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0177}{der-018}{微分 · R3}

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0178}{der-019}{微分 · R2}

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0179}{der-020}{微分 · R3}

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0180}{td-der-001}{微分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2*(1-3*x^2)/(1+x^2)^3|\par

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0181}{td-der-002}{微分 · R2}

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0182}{td-der-003}{微分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(1+x)+x/(1+x)|\par

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0183}{td-der-004}{微分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-3*sin(x)/(5+3*cos(x))|\par

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0184}{der-021}{微分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2*x*y+y*cos(x*y)|\par
\textbf{Note.} 偏 x 微分得 2xy + cos(xy)*y。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0185}{der-022}{微分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x^2*exp(x*y)+3*y^2|\par
\textbf{Note.} d/dy of x e\textasciicircum{}\{xy\} = x*e\textasciicircum{}\{xy\}*x = x\textasciicircum{}2 e\textasciicircum{}\{xy\}，再加 3y\textasciicircum{}2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0186}{der-023}{微分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|exp(x*y)*(1+x*y)|\par
\textbf{Note.} 先得 f\_y=x e\textasciicircum{}\{xy\}，再對 x 微分為 e\textasciicircum{}\{xy\}+xy e\textasciicircum{}\{xy\}=e\textasciicircum{}\{xy\}(1+xy)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0187}{der-024}{微分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|22/5|\par
\textbf{Note.} grad f=(2x,2y)，在 (1,2) 為 (2,4)。與 (3/5,4/5) 內積得 22/5。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0188}{der-025}{微分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2*x/(x^2+y^2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 u=x\textasciicircum{}2+y\textasciicircum{}2，u\_x=2x，所以 f\_x=2x/(x\textasciicircum{}2+y\textasciicircum{}2)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0189}{der-026}{微分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2*x*sin(3*x)+3*x^2*cos(3*x)|\par

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0190}{der-027}{微分 · R2}

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0191}{der-028}{微分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|exp(x)/(1+exp(2*x))|\par

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0192}{der-029}{微分 · R2}

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0193}{der-030}{微分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-(2*x+y)/(x+2*y)|\par

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0194}{der-031}{微分 · R4}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0195}{der-032}{微分 · R4}

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0196}{der-033}{微分 · R4}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0197}{der-034}{微分 · R4}

\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0198}{der-035}{微分 · R4}

\begin{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}

\textbf{Note.} κ = x/(x\textasciicircum{}2+1)\textasciicircum{}\{3/2\}, max at x=1/√2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0467}{int-001}{積分 · R1}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2*x^3|\par
\textbf{Note.} 次方積分公式。常數 C 可省略。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0468}{int-002}{積分 · R1}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|sin(x)|\par
\textbf{Note.} sin x 的導數是 cos x。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0469}{int-003}{積分 · R1}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(abs(x))|\par
\textbf{Note.} 基本積分為 ln|x|。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0470}{int-004}{積分 · R1}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|exp(3*x)/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} 鏈鎖律反向使用。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0471}{int-005}{積分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|exp(x^2)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 u=x\textasciicircum{}2，du=2x dx。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0472}{int-006}{積分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(1+x^2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} 分子是分母導數。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0473}{int-007}{積分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|sin(x^2)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 u=x\textasciicircum{}2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0474}{int-008}{積分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1|\par
\textbf{Note.} 原函數 x\textasciicircum{}3，代入 0 到 1。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0475}{int-009}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x^2*log(x)/2-x^2/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} 分部積分，u=ln x，dv=x dx。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0476}{int-010}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-cos(x)+cos(x)^3/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} sin\textasciicircum{}3 x = sin x(1-cos\textasciicircum{}2 x)，令 u=cos x。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0477}{int-011}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|atan(x/2)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 套 arctan 形式。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0478}{int-012}{積分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} 用 sin\textasciicircum{}2 x=(1-cos 2x)/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0479}{int-013}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x*(log(x)^2-2*log(x)+2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} 分部積分兩次。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0480}{int-014}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x^2/2-log(x^2+1)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 先做多項式除法：x\textasciicircum{}3/(x\textasciicircum{}2+1)=x-x/(x\textasciicircum{}2+1)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0481}{int-015}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|exp(x)*(sin(x)-cos(x))/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 分部積分兩次，或猜 e\textasciicircum{}x(a sin x+b cos x)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0482}{int-016}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2*log(2)-1|\par
\textbf{Note.} 原函數是 (1+x)ln(1+x)-(1+x)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0483}{int-017}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1|\par
\textbf{Note.} 分部積分，邊界項留下 1。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0484}{int-018}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-log(1+cos(x))|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 u=1+cos x，du=-sin x dx。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0485}{int-019}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2*sqrt(x)-2*log(1+sqrt(x))|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 u=sqrt x，dx=2u du。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0486}{int-020}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(2)/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 u=1+x\textasciicircum{}3。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0487}{td-int-001}{積分 · R6}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi*exp(-3)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 使用 Fourier transform 型公式：int\_0\textasciicircum{}infty cos(tx)/(1+x\textasciicircum{}2) dx = pi e\textasciicircum{}\{-|t|\}/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0488}{td-int-002}{積分 · R6}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi*log(9/2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} 套公式 int\_0\textasciicircum{}pi log(a+b cos x) dx = pi log((a+sqrt(a\textasciicircum{}2-b\textasciicircum{}2))/2)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0489}{td-int-003}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(2/5)|\par
\textbf{Note.} Frullani 公式：int\_0\textasciicircum{}infty (e\textasciicircum{}\{-alpha x\}-e\textasciicircum{}\{-beta x\})/x dx = log(beta/alpha)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0490}{td-int-004}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(7/3)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 用 2 sin A sin B = cos(A-B)-cos(A+B)，再套 Frullani 型結果。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0491}{td-int-005}{積分 · R6}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/sqrt(5)|\par
\textbf{Note.} 二次型矩陣 [[3,1],[1,2]] 的行列式為 5，面積是 pi/sqrt(det A)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0492}{td-int-006}{積分 · R6}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|sqrt(pi)/(12*sqrt(3))|\par
\textbf{Note.} 高斯積分偶次矩：int x\textasciicircum{}\{2m\}e\textasciicircum{}\{-a x\textasciicircum{}2\} dx=(2m-1)!! sqrt(pi)/(2\textasciicircum{}m a\textasciicircum{}\{m+1/2\})。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0493}{int-021}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1|\par
\textbf{Note.} 內積分為 x+1/2，外積分為 1/2+1/2=1。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0494}{int-022}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|2|\par
\textbf{Note.} D 是直角三角形，兩股長皆為 2，面積為 2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0495}{int-023}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/8|\par
\textbf{Note.} 內積分為 x*y\textasciicircum{}2/2|\_0\textasciicircum{}x=x\textasciicircum{}3/2，外積分得 1/8。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0496}{int-024}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} 內積分為 x(1-x)+(1-x)\textasciicircum{}2/2=(1-x\textasciicircum{}2)/2，外積分得 1/3。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0497}{int-025}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 極座標下為 int\_0\textasciicircum{}\{2pi\} int\_0\textasciicircum{}1 r\textasciicircum{}3 dr dtheta = 2pi*(1/4)=pi/2。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0498}{int-026}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|9|\par
\textbf{Note.} 分離為 (int\_0\textasciicircum{}2 x dx)(int\_0\textasciicircum{}3 y dy)=2*(9/2)=9。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0499}{int-027}{積分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(1+x^2)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} u=1+x\textasciicircum{}2，積分為 (1/2)log(1+x\textasciicircum{}2)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0500}{int-028}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x*log(x)-x|\par
\textbf{Note.} 分部積分得 x log x - int 1 dx = x log x - x。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0501}{int-029}{積分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|atan(x/3)/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} 由標準公式得 (1/3)atan(x/3)。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0502}{int-030}{積分 · R2}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} 令 u=sin x，積分變成 int\_0\textasciicircum{}1 u\textasciicircum{}3 du = 1/4。
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0503}{int-031}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} Swap order: integral is int\_0\textasciicircum{}1 x\textasciicircum{}2*x dx = int\_0\textasciicircum{}1 x\textasciicircum{}3 dx = 1/4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0504}{int-032}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|3*pi|\par
\textbf{Note.} Area = pi(4-1)=3pi.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0505}{int-033}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|4*pi|\par
\textbf{Note.} Integral of r\textasciicircum{}2 over disk radius 2 is int\_0\textasciicircum{}\{2pi\}int\_0\textasciicircum{}2 r\textasciicircum{}3 dr dtheta=8pi. Half is 4pi.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0506}{int-034}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} The region is x>=0,y>=0,x\textasciicircum{}2+y\textasciicircum{}2<=1, so the area is pi/4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0507}{int-035}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} The integral is 2pi*(1/4)=pi/2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0508}{int-036}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/6|\par
\textbf{Note.} Integral is (1/2)int\_0\textasciicircum{}1(1-y)\textasciicircum{}2dy=1/6.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0509}{int-038}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x*sin(x)+cos(x)|\par
\textbf{Note.} Integration by parts gives x sin x - int sin x dx = x sin x + cos x.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0510}{int-039}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} The integral is atan(1)-atan(0)=pi/4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0511}{int-040}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1|\par
\textbf{Note.} The integral equals Gamma(2)=1!=1.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0512}{int-041}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(1+x^4)/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} With u=1+x\textasciicircum{}4, the antiderivative is (1/4)log(1+x\textasciicircum{}4).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0513}{int-042}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|(2/9)*(1+x^3)^(3/2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} u=1+x\textasciicircum{}3 gives (1/3)int u\textasciicircum{}\{1/2\}du = (2/9)(1+x\textasciicircum{}3)\textasciicircum{}\{3/2\}.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0514}{int-043}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(1+sqrt(1+x^2))|\par
\textbf{Note.} With u=sqrt(1+x\textasciicircum{}2), the integrand becomes du/(1+u), so the answer is log(1+sqrt(1+x\textasciicircum{}2)).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0515}{int-044}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(1+exp(x^2))/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} u=1+e\textasciicircum{}\{x\textasciicircum{}2\} gives (1/2)int du/u = (1/2)log(1+e\textasciicircum{}\{x\textasciicircum{}2\}).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0516}{int-045}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(x)^3/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} u=log x changes the integral to int u\textasciicircum{}2 du = u\textasciicircum{}3/3.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0517}{int-046}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|3/8|\par
\textbf{Note.} The integral is int\_1\textasciicircum{}2 u\textasciicircum{}\{-3\}du = [-1/(2u\textasciicircum{}2)]\_1\textasciicircum{}2 = 3/8.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0518}{int-047}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi|\par
\textbf{Note.} The graph is the upper quarter of x\textasciicircum{}2+y\textasciicircum{}2=4, so the area is pi.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0519}{int-048}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} After x=sin theta, the integral is int\_0\textasciicircum{}\{pi/2\} sin\textasciicircum{}2 theta dtheta = pi/4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0520}{int-049}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi|\par
\textbf{Note.} With x=2sin theta, the integral becomes 4*(pi/4)=pi.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0521}{int-050}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/3|\par
\textbf{Note.} With x=sec theta, the integrand becomes dtheta. The bounds give pi/3.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0522}{int-051}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x/(4*sqrt(x^2+4))|\par
\textbf{Note.} The standard result is int dx/(x\textasciicircum{}2+a\textasciicircum{}2)\textasciicircum{}\{3/2\}=x/(a\textasciicircum{}2 sqrt(x\textasciicircum{}2+a\textasciicircum{}2)); here a\textasciicircum{}2=4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0523}{int-052}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|exp(x)*(x^2-2*x+2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} Two rounds of IBP give e\textasciicircum{}x(x\textasciicircum{}2-2x+2).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0524}{int-053}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|-x^2*cos(x)+2*x*sin(x)+2*cos(x)|\par
\textbf{Note.} IBP gives -x\textasciicircum{}2 cos x + 2int x cos x dx = -x\textasciicircum{}2 cos x + 2x sin x + 2cos x.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0525}{int-055}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x*(log(x)^2-2*log(x)+2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} IBP gives x(log x)\textasciicircum{}2-2int log x dx = x(log x)\textasciicircum{}2-2(xlog x-x).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0526}{int-056}{積分 · R4}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/4-1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} IBP gives pi/8 - (1/2)int\_0\textasciicircum{}1 x\textasciicircum{}2/(1+x\textasciicircum{}2)dx = pi/8 - 1/2 + pi/8 = pi/4-1/2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0527}{int-057}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|(exp(x)-sin(x)-cos(x))/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} F=e\textasciicircum{}x int\_0\textasciicircum{}x e\textasciicircum{}\{-t\}sin t dt = (e\textasciicircum{}x-sin x-cos x)/2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0528}{int-058}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|(exp(2*x)-2*x-1)/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} e\textasciicircum{}\{2x\}int\_0\textasciicircum{}x t e\textasciicircum{}\{-2t\}dt = e\textasciicircum{}\{2x\}/4-x/2-1/4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0529}{int-059}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x^2-2*x+2-2*exp(-x)|\par
\textbf{Note.} Solving F'+F=x\textasciicircum{}2 with F(0)=0 gives F=x\textasciicircum{}2-2x+2-2e\textasciicircum{}\{-x\}.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0530}{int-060}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|x*sin(x)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} Expanding and integrating gives x sin x/2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0531}{int-061}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} Let I be the integral. The transformed integral has cos\textasciicircum{}3 numerator. Adding gives 2I=int\_0\textasciicircum{}\{pi/2\}1 dx=pi/2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0532}{int-062}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|1/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} I plus its transformed version equals int\_0\textasciicircum{}1 1 dx=1, so I=1/2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0533}{int-063}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} Adding the integral to its transformed copy gives int\_0\textasciicircum{}\{pi/2\}1 dx=pi/2, hence I=pi/4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0534}{int-064}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi^2/4|\par
\textbf{Note.} The symmetric factor gives I=(pi/2)int\_0\textasciicircum{}pi sin x/(1+cos\textasciicircum{}2x)dx. With u=cos x, the remaining integral is pi/2, so I=pi\textasciicircum{}2/4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0535}{int-065}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(7/3)|\par
\textbf{Note.} Frullani gives int\_0\textasciicircum{}infty (e\textasciicircum{}\{-ax\}-e\textasciicircum{}\{-bx\})/x dx = log(b/a). Here a=3,b=7.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0536}{int-066}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(4)|\par
\textbf{Note.} The value is log(4/1)=log 4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0537}{int-067}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(4)|\par
\textbf{Note.} Frullani gives log(8/2)=log 4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0538}{int-068}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(5/2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} The cosine Frullani identity gives log(5/2).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0539}{int-069}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(4)|\par
\textbf{Note.} int\_0\textasciicircum{}infty (cos x - cos 4x)/x dx = log 4.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0540}{int-070}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(3)|\par
\textbf{Note.} The integral equals log(9/3)=log 3.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0541}{int-071}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(11/5)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} The integral is (1/2)int\_0\textasciicircum{}infty (cos 5x - cos 11x)/x dx = (1/2)log(11/5).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0542}{int-072}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(2)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} The value is (1/2)log(8/4)=log(2)/2.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0543}{int-073}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(5/3)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} The integral equals (1/2)log(5/3).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0544}{int-074}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|pi*log(5/2)/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} Frullani gives (pi/2)log(5/2).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0545}{int-075}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(5/2)|\par
\textbf{Note.} Frullani gives log(5/2).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0546}{int-076}{積分 · R5}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(6)|\par
\textbf{Note.} By Frullani, the value is log 6.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0547}{gap-int-pf-001}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|(log(x-1)-log(x+1))/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} Partial fractions give 1/(x\textasciicircum{}2-1)=1/2/(x-1)-1/2/(x+1).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0548}{gap-int-pf-002}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(x)|\par
\textbf{Note.} The integrand reduces to 1/x, so the answer is log x.
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0549}{gap-int-pf-003}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|(log(x)-log(x+2))/2|\par
\textbf{Note.} 1/(x(x+2))=(1/2)/x-(1/2)/(x+2).
\end{solutionitem}

\begin{solutionitem}
\solutionmeta{0550}{gap-int-pf-004}{積分 · R3}
\textbf{Answer.} \path|log(x+1)+log(x+2)|\par
